en_title: The Odyssey Blows Box Office Expectations Out of the Water With $264.1 Million Opening Weekend
cn_title: 《奥德赛》全球首周末票房2.641亿美元(约合人民币18亿元)，创诺兰新高
subtitle: 大幅超出预期
opus_summary: 克里斯托弗·诺兰的《奥德赛》全球首周末票房达2.641亿美元(约合人民币18亿元)，刷新其个人开画纪录，并超过此前2.578亿美元(约合人民币17亿元)的全球预测。

paragraphs.en: Director Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey has blown box office expectations out of the water with an opening weekend that brought home an incredible $264.1 million worldwide.
paragraphs.cn: 导演克里斯托弗·诺兰的《奥德赛》远超票房预期，全球首周末斩获惊人的2.641亿美元(约合人民币18亿元)，即264.1百万美元(约合人民币18亿元)。

paragraphs.en: The split puts the adaptation at a domestic haul of $124.5 million, with international markets accounting for the other $139.6 million (via Deadline ). The global total marks Nolan's biggest box office opening weekend ever, towering over his previous achievements, including The Dark Knight Rises at $249 million and The Dark Knight at $198 million.
paragraphs.cn: 据Deadline报道，这部改编电影在北美取得1.245亿美元(约合人民币8亿元)，即124.5百万美元(约合人民币8亿元)，国际市场贡献另外1.396亿美元(约合人民币9亿元)，即139.6百万美元(约合人民币9亿元)。全球总成绩创下诺兰职业生涯最高首周末票房，超过《蝙蝠侠：黑暗骑士崛起》的2.49亿美元(约合人民币17亿元)，即249百万美元(约合人民币17亿元)，以及《蝙蝠侠：黑暗骑士》的1.98亿美元(约合人民币13亿元)，即198百万美元(约合人民币13亿元)。

paragraphs.en: "Incredibly rewarding to see the palpable excitement in theatres this weekend with the release of The Odyssey," Universal told Deadline. "Once again, Christopher Nolan has crafted an epic adventure on a scale rarely seen as audiences respond with not only tremendous results at the box office, but with reactions to the film that are beyond stellar."
paragraphs.cn: 环球影业向Deadline表示：「《奥德赛》本周末上映后，看到影院里真切可感的兴奋氛围，令人无比欣慰。克里斯托弗·诺兰再次打造出一场规模罕见的史诗冒险，观众不仅带来了惊人的票房成绩，对影片的反响也好得超乎想象。」

paragraphs.en: Early reports had The Odyssey expected to bring in an already strong $90 million to $100 million domestically and $257.8 million globally. At $124.5 million in domestically and $264.1 million worldwide, it's clearly sailed past those estimates.
paragraphs.cn: 早期报道预计，《奥德赛》北美票房将达到90百万至100百万美元(约合人民币6亿至7亿元)，全球票房为257.8百万美元(约合人民币17亿元)。最终北美124.5百万美元(约合人民币8亿元)、全球264.1百万美元(约合人民币18亿元)的成绩，显然已驶过这些预测。

paragraphs.en: Variety reported that the film cost $250 million to produce and $125 million to promote. That makes it one of the more expensive theatrical productions of the year so far, but with its first few days already putting it past its production budget, it likely won't be long before it completely recoups those costs.
paragraphs.cn: 《综艺》报道称，影片制作成本为250百万美元(约合人民币17亿元)，宣传费用为125百万美元(约合人民币8亿元)，是今年迄今成本较高的院线作品之一。不过上映头几天的票房已超过制作成本，完全收回各项投入应该不会等太久。

paragraphs.en: The Odyssey, the 13th feature-length film directed by Nolan, premiered July 17 and stars Matt Damon as Odysseus, Anne Hathaway as Penelope, Tom Holland as Telemachus, Zendaya as Athena, Robert Pattinson as Antinous, Elliot Page as Sinon, Lupita Nyong'o as Helen/Clytemnestra, and many, many more. Propped up as an almost three-hour, modern adaptation of Homer's Greek epic and the latest built-for-Imax project from a Best Picture-winning filmmaker , it's easy to see why expectations for this particular movie already felt extraordinarily high.
paragraphs.cn: 《奥德赛》是诺兰执导的第13部长片，于7月17日上映。马特·达蒙饰演奥德修斯，安妮·海瑟薇饰演佩涅洛佩，汤姆·赫兰德饰演忒勒马科斯，赞达亚饰演雅典娜，罗伯特·帕丁森饰演安提诺俄斯，Elliot Page饰演西农，露皮塔·尼永奥饰演海伦／克吕泰涅斯特拉，另有众多演员加盟。影片时长接近三小时，是对荷马希腊史诗的现代改编，也是这位奥斯卡最佳影片得主专为IMAX打造的最新项目，外界期待值自然极高。

paragraphs.en: Despite this – and despite the months-long campaign against the film that saw its pre-release marketing marred by "controversy" online – Nolan seems to have firmly come out on top. The journey ahead will see the star-studded adventure hoping to maintain momentum through each proceeding weekend. Although how that will play out remains to be seen, many are already expecting to see it at least break through the fabled $1 billion milestone.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管如此，影片上映前的营销还经历了持续数月的抵制行动，被网络「争议」笼罩，但诺兰似乎仍稳稳胜出。接下来，这部群星云集的冒险片需要在后续每个周末维持势头。最终走势仍有待观察，但许多人已预计其至少会突破传说中的10亿美元(约合人民币68亿元)大关。

paragraphs.en: For comparison, Nolan's previous project, 2023's Oppenheimer , pulled $180.4 million in its opening weekend . The Barbenheimer phenomenon helped the R-rated J. Robert Oppenheimer biopic finish its time in theaters just shy of $1 billion with a global total of $975.8 million (via Box Office Mojo ). Only time will reveal how far The Odyssey's sea legs will be able to carry it, but for those who have seen it (and recorded their thoughts on review aggregator Rotten Tomatoes ), it seems to be one movie worth showing up for.
paragraphs.cn: 作为对比，诺兰上一部作品、2023年的《奥本海默》首周末取得180.4百万美元(约合人民币12亿元)。「芭比海默」现象帮助这部R级J. Robert Oppenheimer传记片在院线周期结束时接近10亿美元(约合人民币68亿元)，全球总票房达到975.8百万美元(约合人民币66亿元)，数据来自Box Office Mojo。《奥德赛》最终能航行多远仍需时间揭晓，但从已观看影片并在烂番茄留下评价的观众来看，它似乎值得走进影院。

paragraphs.en: Meanwhile, as shared by Variety , Disney's live-action Moana movie came in second, with its total now coasting at $178 million. Minions & Monsters and Toy Story 5 tied for third, with the former's global haul sitting at $323 million, while the latter has reached $958 million. Supergirl has a worldwide total of just $120 million.
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，据《综艺》报道，迪士尼真人版《海洋奇缘》位列第二，累计票房178百万美元(约合人民币12亿元)。《小黄人与怪兽》和《玩具总动员5》并列第三，前者全球票房323百万美元(约合人民币22亿元)，后者已达958百万美元(约合人民币65亿元)。《超级少女》全球票房则仅为120百万美元(约合人民币8亿元)。

paragraphs.en: IGN gave The Odyssey an 8/10 review . "The Odyssey adapts Homer through a new eye that brings a sense of horror and existential angst to the story – and some humor too," we said. "It may not be a perfect movie, but it’s a pretty great moviegoing experience all the same."
paragraphs.cn: IGN为《奥德赛》给出8/10评分：「《奥德赛》以全新视角改编荷马史诗，为故事注入恐怖感、存在主义焦虑，也带来一些幽默。它或许并不完美，但仍是相当出色的观影体验。」

paragraphs.en: The Odyssey has arrived, but its box office opening weekend will be far from the last we'll hear of it – or its director . For more while we wait for updates, you can . You can also see Pattinson recall the time he thought he heard Damon having a "really bad toilet experience" while filming .
paragraphs.cn: 《奥德赛》已经上映，但这个开画周末远不会是我们最后一次听到它——或其导演——的消息。罗伯特·帕丁森还曾回忆，拍摄期间他一度以为自己听见达蒙经历了一次「非常糟糕的如厕体验」。
